## Skill Name
<!-- lowercase, hyphens only -->

## Description
<!-- What would this skill do? -->

## Trigger Keywords
<!-- When should this skill activate? -->

## Domain/Category
<!-- e.g., AWS & Cloud, Platform & Infra, Development -->

## Existing Resources
<!-- Any existing skills, docs, or repos that could be a base? -->

## Priority
- [ ] High — I need this regularly
- [ ] Medium — Nice to have
- [ ] Low — Future consideration
